description: Redacts PII/PHI from text before it reaches an LLM. Fail-closed, self-hosted, no egress.
name: io.github.Rinava/umbryn-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Detection engine: auto (default), regex, or presidio
environmentVariables.name: UMBRYN_ENGINE

environmentVariables.description: Trust threshold (0-1); detections below it fail closed. Default 0.5
environmentVariables.name: UMBRYN_MIN_CONFIDENCE

environmentVariables.description: Sensitivity floor (0-1); below this a signal is noise. Default 0.35
environmentVariables.name: UMBRYN_DETECTION_FLOOR
